minimality.n_0: H^0(CP1,O(0)) is a singlet and fails weak-doublet breaking
minimality.n_1: H^0(CP1,O(1)) is the first nontrivial section space and gives C^2
minimality.n_ge_2: higher O(n) produce larger SU(2) multiplets and fail one-Higgs minimality

explicit_nonclaims: replacement of the epsilon_H=0 hierarchy/naturality lane
claim_boundary: This artifact identifies the OPH one-Higgs carrier as the minimal Borel-Weil section object H^0(CP1,O(1)). It supplies representation, hypercharge-convention, and stabilizer geometry only.
